name: TECHPRECISION CORP
summary: TechPrecision Corporation, through subsidiaries Ranor and Stadco, manufactures large-scale precision fabricated and machined metal structural components for defense, aerospace, and precision industrial customers. Services include custom fabrication, CNC machining, welding, heat treating, assembly, non-destructive testing, and inspection. Products include components for U.S. Navy submarines, aircraft carriers, USMC military helicopters, and defense/aerospace programs. All operations and customers are located in the United States.
